yellowfin_tuna.notes: Unavailable species is shown clearly in the UI; no fallback fish-location claim is made.

mahi_mahi.notes: Model under audit: nearshore saturation detected. Do not use as real prediction. Model under audit: nearshore saturation detected. Do not use as real prediction. Model under audit: nearshore saturation detected. Do not use as real prediction. Relative habitat suitability from a presence/background model; not exact fish location or guaranteed catch.
mahi_mahi.warning: Model under audit: nearshore saturation detected. Do not use as real prediction.

striped_marlin.notes: Unavailable species is shown clearly in the UI; no fallback fish-location claim is made.

demo.notes: Demo mode uses the most recent historical trained-model prediction files available per species.

mahi_mahi.warning: Current/tomorrow output uses latest available environmental data where target-day sources are unavailable.
mahi_mahi.score_explanation: Score is relative habitat suitability / hotspot score, not exact fish location or true catch probability.
mahi_mahi.source_resolution_note: 500m display grid resampled from source environmental features.
mahi_mahi.notes: Today/tomorrow inference is experimental and should be used as decision-support only.
